title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, raised $26M for an ad monetization platform targeting AI tools. He argues that ads rather than subscriptions are the viable path forward for AI applications, and identifies human trust as the primary bottleneck for AI agent adoption, not technological capability.
